Description:
As a TA
I want to create my applicant profile
So that I can submit complete applications.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The TA can enter name, student ID, programme, year of study, skills and availability.
2. Required fields must be validated before saving.
3. The profile can be saved successfully and reopened later.
4. An error message is shown if required information is missing.

Description:
As a TA
I want to edit my profile information
So that my information remains accurate and up to date.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The TA can update previously saved information.
2. Updated information is saved and displayed correctly.
3. Existing CV records are kept unless replaced deliberately.

Description:
As a TA
I want to upload my CV
So that organisers can review my qualifications.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The TA can upload a CV file from the local device.
2. The system shows the uploaded file name after a successful upload.
3. The TA can replace the uploaded CV with a newer version.
4. An error message is shown if no file is selected.

Description:
As a TA
I want to browse available jobs
So that I can identify positions that match my interests and availability.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system displays a list of currently open jobs.
2. Each job card shows the module or activity name, role type, hours and deadline.
3. Closed jobs are not shown in the default open-job list.

Description:
As a TA
I want to filter and search jobs
So that I can find suitable jobs more efficiently.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The TA can filter jobs by module or activity, type and status.
2. The TA can search jobs by keyword.
3. Filtered results update correctly.
4. An empty-state message is shown if no result matches the filter.

Description:
As a TA
I want to view detailed job information
So that I can decide whether to apply.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The TA can open a job detail page from the job list.
2. The detail page includes role description, requirements, hours, deadline and organiser information.
3. The page clearly shows whether the job is open or closed.

Description:
As a TA
I want to apply for a job
So that I can be considered for a TA position.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The TA must complete profile information before applying.
2. The TA must upload a CV before applying.
3. The system confirms successful submission.
4. The application is recorded in the TA application list.
5. The MO can view the submitted application in the applicant list.

Description:
As a TA
I want to view my application status
So that I know whether my application is pending, shortlisted, rejected or selected.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The TA can open a My Applications page.
2. Each submitted application shows its current status.
3. Status labels are displayed consistently and clearly.
4. The TA can access the related job title from the application record.

Description:
As an MO
I want to create and publish a job post
So that eligible students can apply.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The MO can enter job title, role description, requirements, hours, deadline and number of vacancies.
2. Required fields must be completed before publishing.
3. Published jobs appear in the TA job list.
4. The MO can save the job as a draft or publish it directly.

Story Name: Edit or Close a Job Post
Description:
As an MO
I want to edit or close a job post
So that outdated or filled jobs are no longer available for new applications.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The MO can edit job details before the deadline.
2. The MO can close a job post manually.
3. Closed jobs are marked as closed and cannot receive new applications.

Description:
As an MO
I want to view applicants for a specific job
So that I can review candidates efficiently.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The MO can open a list of applicants for each posted job.
2. Each applicant entry shows name, programme, availability and application status.
3. The applicant count is displayed clearly for the job.

Description:
As an MO
I want to review an applicantˇŻs full profile and CV
So that I can make an informed selection decision.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The MO can open an applicant detail page from the applicant list.
2. The page shows profile information and CV access.
3. The MO can return to the applicant list without losing context.

Description:
As an MO
I want to select, reject or waitlist applicants
So that the recruitment outcome can be managed clearly.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The MO can set the application outcome to Selected, Rejected or Waitlisted.
2. The updated decision is reflected in the applicant list.
3. The TA sees the updated status in My Applications.

Description:
As an Admin
I want to view each TAˇŻs overall workload
So that I can monitor allocation fairness.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The admin can view a list of TAs with their assigned or selected workload summary.
2. The summary includes TA name, number of assigned posts and total hours.
3. The admin can identify heavily loaded TAs easily.

Description:
As an Admin
I want to filter workload records
So that I can inspect specific TAs or overloaded cases.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The admin can search by TA name or student ID.
2. The admin can filter by workload status.
3. An empty-state message is shown if no record matches the filter.

Description:
As an MO
I want to see a skill-matching suggestion for applicants
So that I can shortlist candidates faster.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system displays a matching score or explanation for each applicant.
2. The result is presented as a suggestion rather than an automatic decision.
3. The explanation is visible to support transparency.

Description:
As an Admin
I want workload balancing suggestions
So that work can be distributed more fairly.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system highlights potentially overloaded TAs.
2. The system provides a suggested redistribution option.
3. Suggestions are advisory rather than automatically applied.
